# ANALYSIS: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK_sniper_stage1_grinder

**Filed:** 2026-06-15  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We are analyzing the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK sniper_stage1 grinder results to determine if the two keepers are viable for promotion. The grinder completed 1728 combos with 2 keepers and a best edge_capture of 229.63. However, we lack the actual keepers.jsonl and results.jsonl files to inspect the keeper parameters and their behavior on J anchor days. The OP-16 edge_capture threshold is 771 (50% of max 1542), and 229.63 is below this threshold. However, SNIPER strategies may be exempt from OP-16 until 3+ live trades are observed, as noted in the leaderboard for similar SNIPER candidates.

## Pre-merge gate

We require: Stage-1 backtest to produce keepers.jsonl and results.jsonl, then OOS walk-forward, real-fills on J anchor days, and regime analysis (specifically checking VIX conditions on J days vs. SNIPER entry conditions).

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- We lack the fundamental data to evaluate the keepers. The reported edge_capture=229.63 is below the OP-16 rejection threshold of 771, but note that OP-16 may be inapplicable for SNIPER until 3+ live trades are observed. However, the regime mismatch (SNIPER requires VIX-escalating per leaderboard notes on #14/#15, while J anchor days are described as mostly DECLINING VIX) suggests the strategy may not fire on J days at all, making its edge_capture on J days zero. Without data on keeper behavior during J days, we cannot assess viability.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not conflict with existing candidates as it is an analysis of a grinder that is not yet on the leaderboard. If the keepers are validated, they may become a new candidate (SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK) but note that OP-16 is inapplicable until 3+ live SNIPER trades are observed (per leaderboard notes on #13/#14/#15). Any promotion would require shadow-trade anchor build first.
